title: Prevent same-email vault collision across orgs
description: idFor(kind, email) currently keys vault entries by email alone — adding the same email from a different org silently overwrites the prior entry in both ~/.sweech/accounts.json and macOS keychain. Real data-loss bug.

context.text: Source (verbatim from 2026-05-16 audit): Audit Section 1: "Same-email accounts collide in vault. idFor(kind, email) keys by email — adding ted@2pumpkins from work org silently overwrites the personal-org entry"

acceptanceCriteria: idFor() includes an org_id (or workspace-fingerprint) component when known
OAuth import prompts for confirmation if kind+email already exists with a different org_id
Existing single-org vaults migrate in-place — no manual re-import required
Does NOT break the case where the same email IS the same account (one org_id)
